title: PLC Telemetry v1
description: Telemetry sample published by detection equipment PLCs to VDDEHMS edge nodes. See ICD-EXT-001.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Major version 1 is supported by this contract.

equipment_id.description: Plant-unique equipment identifier. Convention: TYPE-LINE-STATION (e.g., TORQUE-L3-S07).

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp at which the samples were captured.

value.description: Numeric sample value. Units are metric-specific and documented in the equipment registry.
